LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF/JUDGMENT CREDITORS PEERAWIJ ISANPAYU'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: CONTEMPT. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS GRANTED. THE COURT RULES THAT THERE IS PROPER PERSONAL SERVICE. THE COURT ISSUES A BODY ATTACHMENT FOR THE PERSON OF DEFENDANT, SURIYA SRITHONG, AND SETS BAIL IN THE AMOUNT OF $20,000.00. THE COURT ISSUES A RETURN DATE OF JUNE 16, 2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 302 FOR HEARING WHETHER OR NOT DEFENDANT SURIYA SRITHONG SHALL BE HELD IN CONTEMPT OF COURT, FOR FAILURE TO FOLLOW LAWFUL ORDERS OF THIS COURT (CCP SECTION 1218). HEARING HELD. DEFENDANT IS PRESENT IN COURT. DEFENDANT WAIVES INSTRUCTION AND ARRAIGNMENT. DEFENDANT ENTERS NOT GUILTY PLEA AND DENIES ALLEGATIONS. THE COURT ORDERS THAT PLAINTIFFS' COUNSEL WILL PROVIDE DISCOVERY TO DEFENSE COUNSEL THIS DATE. MATTER IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 23, 2009 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 302, TO SET CONTEMPT HEARING. DEFENDANT IS ORDERED TO APPEAR. BAIL REMAINS IN EFFECT, AS IS. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

Off Calendar Oct-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Peeranwij Isanpayu and Patwira Isanpayu's Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery granted:
a. All objections are waived, with the exception of attorney-client and attorney-work product privilege;
b. Judgment debtor Suriya Srithong shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's post-judgment Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents [Set One], Special Interrogatories [Set One], and Form Interrogatories within ten days of the date of this order;
2. Request for monetary sanctions granted; sanctions shall issue in the total sum of $540.00. Imposition of sanctions is stayed for ten days from the date of this order; if defendant serves discovery responses as ordered, sanctions shall be permanently stayed. Commissioner: Paul Slavit, not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-20-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Dec-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Appearances
Plaintiffs, Peerawij Isanpayu and Patwira Isanpayu, are present.
Attorney, Jesse C. Ralph, is present representing the plaintiffs.

Defendant, Suriya Srithong, is not present.
(Default was entered on 10/21/07 as to the defendant)

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Plaintiffs are sworn. Counsel testifies via offer of proof.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant, Suriya Srithong, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiff, as and for special damages, the sum of $50,00.00, punitive/exemplary damages in the sum of $150,000.00, filing fees in the sum of $335.00 and service of process in the sum of $117.00 for a total Judgment of $200,452.00. Default Judgment by Court signed in open court.
